allow: Bash(find app config database routes scripts -name '*.php' | sort | while read f; do php -l "$f" 2>&1 | grep -v "No syntax errors" | grep -v "^$" | sed "s|^|  $f: |"; done; echo "PHP syntax check complete")
Bash(find resources/views -name '*.blade.php' | sort | while read f; do php -l "$f" 2>&1 | grep -v "No syntax errors" | grep -v "^$" | sed "s|^|  $f: |"; done; echo "Blade syntax check complete")
